ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "chest_pain_type" INTEGER /* Type of chest pain experienced by the patient */,
  "resting_bp" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure of the patient */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "resting_blood_sugar" INTEGER /* Resting blood sugar level of the patient */,
  "resting_ecg" INTEGER /* Resting ECG result of the patient */,
  "max_hr" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate of the patient */,
  "exercise_angina" INTEGER /* Whether the patient experiences exercise angina */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* Oldpeak value of the patient */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has heart disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the doctor practices */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "emergency_department" INTEGER /* Whether the hospital has an emergency department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor attending to the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms experienced by the patient */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Test results for the patient */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis given to the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan for the patient */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication prescribed to the patient */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up date for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition the patient has */,
  "medical_condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "year_diagnosed" INTEGER /* Year the patient was diagnosed with the condition */,
  "year_resolved" INTEGER /* Year the patient was resolved from the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "medication_description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the user works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
